description: Composition Dark blue shirt with pink polka dots, made of 100% cotton, has short puffed and cuff sleeves, tipped collar with front button placket, curved hemline and brand badge on left hip Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Perfect on style and great in comfort, this polka dot shirt from wrangler makes for a great semi-formal wear. The puffed and buttoned cuff sleeve creates a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim Fit jeans and ballerina shoes and ooze style. Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26”
